content.thinking:
The bug is clear: in `src/utils.ts`, the `processItems` function uses `i < items.length - 1` which skips the last element. It should be `i < items.length`.

Let me fix it.

content.text: The bug is clear. In `src/utils.ts`, the loop condition `i < items.length - 1` skips the last element. The fix is to change it to `i < items.length`.
